case_title: TAMAM RASHED VS. ADEL HALABI et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RASHED, TAMAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALABI, ADEL JANE DOE 1 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1292 HOLLISTER AVE. S.F. CA. 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HALABI, ADEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HALABI, ADEL
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF RASHED, TAMAM ON DEFENDANT HALABI, ADEL
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF RASHED, TAMAM SERVED JAN-18-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HALABI, ADEL JANE DOE 1
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, COST BILL $218.74 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HALABI, ADEL
DECLARATION FOR AMENDED MONEY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RASHED, TAMAM
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RASHED, TAMAM AS TO DEFENDANT HALABI, ADEL JANE DOE 1 DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT HALABI, ADEL JANE DOE 1
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $23.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF RASHED, TAMAM

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RASHED, TAMAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALABI, ADEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RESTORED TO PLTF. ON 2/19/03 $4,643.27 RENT, $218.74 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,862.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF AMENDED UNLAWFUL DETAINER DEFAULT JUDGMENT
